title: librepo bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.18.0-5]
- Fix input termination for pgpParsePkts
  Resolves: RHEL-82533

[1.18.0-4]
- Propagate return value from prepare_repo_download_targets (RHEL-85338)
